TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Makazayazaya = Gaga mniq Pingtung Macyasyang ka alang Makazayazaya. 86 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 261 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 256 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 5 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan92%, Rukai1%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o3%. Hangan alang alang Ma-cya. Pnseanak alang Alang nii paah pusu hangan " Ma-qa-ca-ya-ca-ya " Pay-yi-ru-s", Ta-ra-pa-kung"dnii mseupu tru alang, bukuy Kwang-fu spuwan tru alang kiya ka Ma-cya-cun ksun. Nniqan Ping-tung-seyn Ma-cya-syang Ma-cya-cun. Llbangan Ma-cya-cun hraan hidaw ni Cyo-fa-wan-cun, gqiyan hidaw ni Pey-yey-cun, daya ni Wu-tay-syang Haw-ca- cun, hunac ni mlutuc Tay-wu-cun. Knlabangan yaa bi 7.4959 ping-fang-kung-ri. Nniqan llingay Dxgal sttuan, knbbaraw na o yaa bi 800 m. Pgkla ppanan rulu Ping-tung‚ÜíRin-rwo‚ÜíNey-pu‚ÜíRung-cyueyn‚ÜíYueyn-cu-min Wun-hwa-yueyn-cyu. Mlutuc teyn-c ti-tu Teyn-c ti-tu alang. Klgan seejiq alang Pay-wan-cu. Skari kari kari Pay-wan, kari Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Snhiyan seuxal klgan. Pnyahan alang Ma-cya-cun paah pusu hangan " Ma-qa-ca-ya-ca-ya" " Pay-yi-ru-s", " Ta-ra-pa-kung" dnii mseupu tru alang, bukuy Kwang-fu spuwan tru alang kiya ka Ma-cya-cun ksun. Ga brah Pey-sung-caw-tay, ida niqan ka alang Ma-cya da, kiya ni paru endaan na Ma-cya se Ta-two-mu, kana rima Ta-two-mu sapah Pay-wan-cu skparu bi. Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang Pusu sqyanan dxgal: Ma-cya Syo-seyn-nung-yey-kwang, Rang-san Pu-bu. Qtaan bnatas
S.PHON: = maka*aja*aja = gaga mniq piŇčtuŇč ma ¶jasjaŇč ka alaŇč maka*aja*aja. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan * ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, paiwan**%, …ĺukai*%, tajal*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč ma- ¶ja. pns…ôanak alaŇč alaŇč nii paańß pusu ńßaŇčan " ma-qa- ¶a-ja- ¶a-ja " paj-ji-…ĺu-s", ta-…ĺa-pa-kuŇč"dnii ms…ôupu t…ĺu alaŇč, bukuj kwaŇč-*u spuwan t…ĺu alaŇč kija ka ma- ¶ja- ¶un ksun. nniqan piŇč-tuŇč-s…ôn ma- ¶ja-sjaŇč ma- ¶ja- ¶un. llbaŇčan ma- ¶ja- ¶un ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw ni ¶jo-*a-wan- ¶un, gqijan ńßidaw ni p…ô-j…ô- ¶un, daja ni wu-taj-sjaŇč ńßaw- ¶a- ¶un, ńßuna ¶ ni mlutu ¶ taj-wu- ¶un. knlabaŇčan jaa bi *.**** piŇč-*aŇč-kuŇč-…ĺi. nniqan lliŇčaj dxgal sttuan, knbba…ĺaw na o jaa bi *** m. pgkla ppanan …ĺulu piŇč-tuŇč*…ĺin-…ĺwo*n…ô-pu*…ĺuŇč- ¶ju…ôn*ju…ôn- ¶u-min wun-ńßwa-ju…ôn- ¶ju. mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč paj-wan- ¶u. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi paj-wan, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw snńßijan s…ôuxal klgan. pnjańßan alaŇč ma- ¶ja- ¶un paańß pusu ńßaŇčan " ma-qa- ¶a-ja- ¶a-ja" " paj-ji-…ĺu-s", " ta-…ĺa-pa-kuŇč" dnii ms…ôupu t…ĺu alaŇč, bukuj kwaŇč-*u spuwan t…ĺu alaŇč kija ka ma- ¶ja- ¶un ksun. ga b…ĺańß p…ô-suŇč- ¶aw-taj, ida niqan ka alaŇč ma- ¶ja da, kija ni pa…ĺu …ôndaan na ma- ¶ja s…ô ta-two-mu, kana …ĺima ta-two-mu sapańß paj-wan- ¶u skpa…ĺu bi. pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč pusu sqjanan dxgal: ma- ¶ja sjo-s…ôn-nuŇč-j…ô-kwaŇč, …ĺaŇč-san pu-bu. qtaan bnatas
S.FORM: = Makazayazaya = Gaga mniq Pingtung Macyasyang ka alang Makazayazaya. 86 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 261 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 256 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 5 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan92%, Rukai1%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o3%. Hangan alang alang Ma-cya. Pnseanak alang Alang nii paah pusu hangan " Ma-qa-ca-ya-ca-ya " Pay-yi-ru-s", Ta-ra-pa-kung"dnii mseupu tru alang, bukuy Kwang-fu spuwan tru alang kiya ka Ma-cya-cun ksun. Nniqan Ping-tung-seyn Ma-cya-syang Ma-cya-cun. Llbangan Ma-cya-cun hraan hidaw ni Cyo-fa-wan-cun, gqiyan hidaw ni Pey-yey-cun, daya ni Wu-tay-syang Haw-ca- cun, hunac ni mlutuc Tay-wu-cun. Knlabangan yaa bi 7.4959 ping-fang-kung-ri. Nniqan llingay Dxgal sttuan, knbbaraw na o yaa bi 800 m. Pgkla ppanan rulu Ping-tung‚ÜíRin-rwo‚ÜíNey-pu‚ÜíRung-cyueyn‚ÜíYueyn-cu-min Wun-hwa-yueyn-cyu. Mlutuc teyn-c ti-tu Teyn-c ti-tu alang. Klgan seejiq alang Pay-wan-cu. Skari kari kari Pay-wan, kari Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Snhiyan seuxal klgan. Pnyahan alang Ma-cya-cun paah pusu hangan " Ma-qa-ca-ya-ca-ya" " Pay-yi-ru-s", " Ta-ra-pa-kung" dnii mseupu tru alang, bukuy Kwang-fu spuwan tru alang kiya ka Ma-cya-cun ksun. Ga brah Pey-sung-caw-tay, ida niqan ka alang Ma-cya da, kiya ni paru endaan na Ma-cya se Ta-two-mu, kana rima Ta-two-mu sapah Pay-wan-cu skparu bi. Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang Pusu sqyanan dxgal: Ma-cya Syo-seyn-nung-yey-kwang, Rang-san Pu-bu. Qtaan bnatas
